subcodes.title: Farewell words to the friends, spoken on 1913-06-08
subcodes.first_line: I love the believers of Paris, not the walls and the houses. The walls do not protect one from his ego. One must become the embodiment of divine love.
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love and unity, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
